evals.prompt: Pick up a handoff, do the work, and close it as done against the live code.
evals.expected_output: A wired board. Following the run-handoff discipline (new -> claim -> release --status done --verified-by) must leave a schema-valid doc archived with verified_at, the lease released, and INDEX.md regenerated to list it under Archive.

evals.prompt: You are blocked on another handoff; record that and release.
evals.expected_output: Following the discipline (claim -> release --status blocked --blocked-on) must set status blocked and blocked_on in the doc, release the lease, and keep the doc on the open board.
